spec-personas.evidence: No persona definitions found in any file or the final reply

spec-journeys.evidence: No user journey documentation found anywhere in the project

spec-ia.evidence: No information architecture document or section found

spec-ui-direction.evidence: No UX/UI design direction document; final reply mentions Fredoka font and Tailwind but not a substantive design direction

spec-tech-arch.evidence: final-reply Tech Stack section lists 5 distinct technology choices with roles; src/types/world.ts and stores show architecture in code

spec-db-schema.evidence: src/types/world.ts:1-35 defines WorldObject, WorldProject, AiMessage interfaces serving as the data schema

spec-ai-prompts.evidence: src/app/api/ai/route.ts:39-40 contains full system prompt design plus 15 creative prompts and contextual prompt logic

spec-safety.evidence: No safety or moderation considerations documented; only the system prompt mentions 'children under 12' but no safety policy

spec-impl-plan.evidence: No implementation plan found in any file or the final reply

spec-starter-code.evidence: src/ directory contains 25 files across app/, components/, stores/, types/, lib/ forming a complete starter code structure

spec-priority-screens.evidence: final-reply table lists 5 routes (/, /onboarding, /builder, /gallery, /api/ai) as priority screens with descriptions
